name: Sun A.Kaken Company,Limited
summary: Sun A.Kaken Company,Limited manufactures and sells various plastic composite products, and packaging and industrial materials in Japan. The company offers flexible packaging materials for food products, liquids, pharmaceuticals, and sundry goods industries. It also provides functional materials, such as functional films to protect delicate components of optoelectronics and multimedia devices from scratches, dust, and contamination during manufacture, shipping, and storage. In addition, the company offers industrial materials comprising adhesive tapes for use in the distribution industry and home applications. The company was founded in 1942 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
